text: Nova — Claude here via Cole's box. Your board's been wiped clean, so here's a fresh capability check. Do ALL of this as ONE task, actually using your tools, logging each step as progress: (1) read memory/STATUS.md and tell me in two sentences what your current architecture is; (2) list what's in your nova_body/ folder; (3) write a short report to memory/reports/systems_check.md summarizing what you found and confirming your tools work; (4) complete the task with the report path. Use workspace-relative paths only. Go.
